message:
fix: replace relative path deps with pinned git deps for cargo install compatibility

All sibling path dependencies (asupersync, frankensqlite,
franken-agent-detection, frankensearch) now use pinned git revisions,
enabling `cargo install --git` to resolve the full dependency chain
without requiring co-located sibling checkouts.

Fixes #156

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
